name: Minted Tomato Saute
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Dried leaf mint (or) 3 tablespoons Chopped fresh Mint
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim stems from tomatoes and rinse.
2. In a large, non-stick skillet, heat the oil over medium heat.
3. Cook tomatoes for 3 minutes, stirring occasionally until they start to soften slightly.
4. Add the mint (either dried leaves or chopped fresh mint) and stir to mix thoroughly.
